input: Use seo-geo-growth-agent to audit this site for SEO and GEO readiness, then rank the P0 fixes.
Create a /for-ai page, /for-ai.json, /for-ai.txt, and llms.txt plan for this institutional article.
Build a bottom-funnel keyword map, content brief, and claim ledger for this product page.
Draft a safe robots.txt policy for search crawlers, AI search bots, user-triggered fetchers, and training crawlers.
Measure AI search visibility using Search Console, Bing Webmaster Tools, GA4 referrals, server logs, and prompt panels.
Check whether the checkout and booking flow is readable by browser agents through semantic HTML and the accessibility tree.
Red-team this GEO plan for fake citations, hidden prompts, unsupported claims, and spam risk.
Turn this article into a citation-safe institutional page with facts, limitations, source links, and do-not-extrapolate guidance.
Generate a dynamic SEO/GEO HTML report for this site, serve it locally, capture desktop and mobile screenshots of the site, run Design Watch, and add analysis cohorts.
Run the full audit workflow for this site, generate missing AI-layer files, validate the report, and serve the HTML page.
Use the screenshots of deeplearning.fr to score first impression, visual trust, hierarchy, topic fit, and mobile readability.
Add a dynamic responsive study for the homepage and tell me if it responds correctly on mobile and desktop with an Agent Browser summary.
Apply the GStack and GBrain improvement ideas to the SEO/GEO skill, update evals, and run the installed skill doctor.
Tell me which traffic, search, AI citation, and visit metrics are publicly accessible versus owner-only for this site.
The audit says the site is missing llms.txt and /for-ai; generate downloadable files I can publish.
Compare these two SEO/GEO audit.json files and tell me narratively what improved or regressed.
Generate a GEO citation prompt panel for ChatGPT, Perplexity and Claude, but mark it ready not executed.
This is a staging site; keep GA4 and GSC as production gates instead of immediate fixes.
Run Evidence Engine with Console Watch, Network Watch and Cache/CDN Watch for this homepage audit.
Generate an owner-data request for GSC, GA4, Bing Webmaster Tools, server logs and Cloudflare Analytics.
Create an ARD /.well-known/ai-catalog.json draft with representativeQueries for this AI skill.
Validate this /.well-known/ai-catalog.json manifest and explain any ARD errors.
Check whether this site exposes ARD through well-known, rel=ai-catalog, or Agentmap.
Use seo-geo-audit to create a repeatable audit workspace and plan-only command receipt.
Make the logo bigger in the navbar and change the button color.
Write a generic motivational LinkedIn post about productivity.
Create a database migration for user accounts.
Run seo-geo-growth-agent demo mode and tell me if the golden audit and installed package doctor pass.
